note: Each burn tick cuts all of Brand's cooldowns by 0.08s, and his W, E, and passive spread burn to the whole enemy team, driving his abilities toward near-zero cooldown for relentless AoE.
Cassiopeia's Twin Fang spam plus her own poison keeps burn ticking constantly, and every tick refunds ability cooldown so she can chain casts almost without pause.
Lillia's passive burn and AoE Q apply multiple burn instances across a teamfight, and each tick refunds cooldown, snowballing her spell uptime.
Hwei's sustained AoE damage-over-time zones keep burn ticking on grouped enemies, and the per-tick cooldown refund lets him cycle his large spell menu faster.

Annie's burst lives in her basic abilities, so +35% ability damage and 70 haste massively boost her Q and W spam; sealing her ult costs Tibbers, so it is a damage gamble best paired with a defensive summoner backup.
Multishot splits Lux's Light Binding to extra enemies in front of her, letting one Q snare most of the enemy team for follow-up burst.
Multishot fires extra Rocket Grabs at additional enemies in front, turning a single hook into a multi-target catch in the single-lane ARAM scrum.
Stackasaurus immediately unlocks the stack-scaling payoff, accelerating Veigar's infinite AP stacking so his per-cast burst ramps far earlier in the game.
Senna already gains permanent AD, range, and crit from souls; front-loading her stack scaling with Stackasaurus turbocharges that growth so she out-scales the lobby sooner.
Spin To Win grants +30 ability haste and +30% damage to spin abilities, boosting Sett's W Haymaker and other spin-pattern damage for cheap value at Silver rarity.
Immobilizing an enemy grants a shield scaling with max health; Sion's Q knockup and E wall-stun proc it reliably, and his enormous HP pool makes each shield huge.
Marksmage adds physical damage equal to 75% AP to basic attacks, bridging TF's AP scaling onto his autos so his blue and red card weaving and auto-resets both hit hard.
Completing the quest fuses Rabadon's and Zhonya's into Wooglet's for a large AP spike plus a Zhonya's active, rewarding Hwei's heavy single-cast burst and giving him a stasis to survive dives.
Yasuo builds toward 100% crit, and Fan the Hammer's bolts each crit and apply on-hit, so his already crit-capped autos become multi-bolt crit volleys.
Caitlyn's long-range crit autos pair perfectly with Fan the Hammer's directional bolts that each can crit for big extra physical damage, amplifying her poke and burst.
Dual Wield fires an extra bolt dealing 40% of the attack and applying on-hit at 40% plus +20% attack speed; Yone weaves crit autos between Q dashes, so the bonus bolts scale with his AD and crit.
Master Yi is a pure on-hit auto-attacker; Dual Wield's extra on-hit bolt and +20% attack speed compound directly with his Wuju Style and E true damage for massive single-target DPS.
Kog'Maw's W converts attacks into percent-health on-hit damage; Dual Wield's extra on-hit bolt and attack-speed boost stack with that to melt frontline targets in sustained fights.
